# Evidence Tier Map

## Tier 1 — strongest

- Regulator enforcement: ACCC PhotobookShop, FTC fake review rule.
- Law enforcement / guilty plea: DOJ Michael Smith streaming fraud.
- Official platform policy/transparency: YouTube, TikTok, X, Meta, Product Hunt, Apple, Google, LinkedIn, GitHub.

## Tier 2 — academic

- Rogers & Righetti on manufactured attention.
- Multi-behavior recommender systems survey.

## Tier 3 — reputable reporting

- WIRED on Geese / Chaotic Good.
- TechCrunch on Chaotic Good/Phia, Cluely, Delve.
- Business Insider on clipping.
- AP on AI scam ads.

## Tier 4 — industry artifacts

- AppsFlyer documentation and field guides.
- Trustpilot transparency reports.
- Amazon enforcement posts.

## Tier 5 — community chatter

- Reddit and forum examples. Use only for operator language or sentiment, not as proof.
